rules.title: TLS certificate verification is disabled
rules.why: Disabling TLS verification enables man-in-the-middle interception.
rules.suggestion: Remove insecure TLS overrides and trust only valid certificates.

rules.title: Potential command injection in process execution
rules.why: Interpolated shell commands can execute attacker-controlled input.
rules.suggestion: Use argument-array APIs and validate/allowlist user inputs.

rules.title: Dynamic code execution detected
rules.why: Dynamic code execution can execute untrusted content.
rules.suggestion: Remove eval-like execution and replace with explicit logic.

rules.title: Weak hash algorithm detected
rules.why: MD5/SHA1 are weak for integrity/security-sensitive use cases.
rules.suggestion: Use SHA-256 or stronger algorithm where security is required.

rules.title: Potential hardcoded secret or private key marker
rules.why: Hardcoded credentials and private keys expose critical secrets.
rules.suggestion: Remove secrets from source and load via secure secret manager.

rules.title: Potential path traversal risk from unsanitized path composition
rules.why: Composing file paths directly from untrusted input can escape intended directories.
rules.suggestion: Normalize and validate path against an allowlisted base directory before file operations.

rules.title: Potential deserialization of untrusted data
rules.owasp: A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
rules.why: Deserializing untrusted data can trigger arbitrary code paths or object abuse.
rules.suggestion: Use safe parser modes and strict schema validation before deserialization.

rules.title: Potential insecure temporary file usage
rules.why: Predictable or globally writable temporary paths can be abused for file race or overwrite attacks.
rules.suggestion: Use secure temp-file APIs and randomized names with restricted permissions.

rules.title: Potential SSRF via untrusted outbound request target
rules.why: Outbound request destination appears to be derived from untrusted input.
rules.suggestion: Enforce allowlist for outbound hosts and validate URL scheme/host before request.

rules.title: Potential insecure CORS configuration
rules.why: Wildcard CORS origin with credentials may expose sensitive authenticated responses.
rules.suggestion: Use strict origin allowlist and avoid credentials with wildcard origins.

rules.title: Potential weak or hardcoded JWT secret
rules.why: Hardcoded weak JWT signing secrets can be brute-forced or leaked from source control.
rules.suggestion: Load strong JWT secret from secure configuration and rotate compromised secrets.

rules.message: Sensitive runtime/policy files changed without matching ownership tests.
Bugbot scanner changed without matching bugbot test updates.
